speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Before we go, let's zoom out and look at the big picture. While markets are celebrating peace hopes and stocks are hitting record highs, there's something even more powerful happening.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] The overview story today is Europe's energy transformation - wind and solar officially generating more power than fossil fuels for the first time ever. It's proof that when we commit to change, we don't just hope for a better future, we build it.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Puts it all in perspective, doesn't it? From ocean protection to renewable energy, from breakthrough science to sport inspiring millions - progress happens when people believe it can.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] That's The Bright Side for Monday, April 13th. I'm Jamie Chen.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] And I'm Alex Mercer. Stay positive, Queensland. ParkSyde rolls on.
